description: Plugin-distributed hooks for azure-cloud. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 6 mechanically-detectable Azure IaC anti-patterns in .bicep/.tf/.json/.yml/.yaml — (1) hardcoded secret, (2) public exposure (0.0.0.0/0 / publicNetworkAccess Enabled / allowBlobPublicAccess / allowSharedKeyAccess), (3) Owner/Contributor at subscription/MG scope, (4) TLS<1.2 / HTTPS-off, (5) hardcoded subscription/tenant GUID, (6) Terraform local backend. Set AZURE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
